title: Undertale Mod BWT
description:
The new undertale mod for your minecraft
MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB
Last version 0.0.1 (Pre-alpha)
body:
The new undertale mod for your minecraft

Version 0.0.1 (Pre-alpha) adds:

Decorative blocks

Monster candy
Heals 4 health points

Stick (For you figth)

Froggit:
Froggit has 2 attacks
Fly (Who are flying at you)
And jump (with which he will catch up with you)


<details>
<summary>Supported languages</summary>

English

Russian

</details>


```
MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB
```


Thas all (yet)
